Here are the top-performing ETFs in first half of 2023 as crypto-related funds soar
Simplify Launches Innovative ETF Combining Income Generation With Bitcoin

overview.description: The Simplify Bitcoin Strategy PLUS Income ETF (MAXI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long btc, short usd currency. The fund is actively managed, aiming to provide capital appreciation and income. The fund holds long Bitcoin futures, short-term debt instruments, and near-term equity index put or call spreads. MAXI was launched on Sep 29, 2022 and is issued by Simplify.

data.title: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify Asset Management announces that it expects to deliver capital gains distributions across ten ETFs.

data.title: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2024

data.text: Hello! This week's ETF Wrap looks at top performers in the first half of 2023, as well as flows, as stocks rally and crypto-related funds jump so far this year.

data.title: Simplify Launches Innovative ETF Combining Income Generation With Bitcoin
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify launches Simplify Bitcoin Strategy PLUS Income ETF (MAXI), first ETF to provide exposure to bitcoin while generating income
